{
  "claims": [
    "The California Senate has declared California to be the first Compassionate State in the United States.",
    "Seventeen communities in California have passed 'Compassionate Resolutions'.",
    "Over 450 cities, counties, and states across 54 countries have declared themselves 'Compassionate' communities.",
    "Research demonstrates that practicing compassion produces positive benefits in all sectors of civic and community life.",
    "The passing of the resolution lays the groundwork for policies advancing inclusion, diversity, and equity.",
    "The resolution establishes a foundation for policy rooted in care and compassion for the Earth and all her beings."
  ]
}
